channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: Stepwise: Neuro-Symbolic Proof Search for Automated Systems Verification
item.description: arXiv:2603.19715v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Formal verification via interactive theorem proving is increasingly used to ensure the correctness of critical systems, yet constructing large proof scripts remains highly manual and limits scalability. Advances in large language models (LLMs), especi...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> paper, large language model, reasoning, LLM, tool | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: openlit - Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.
item.description: Open source platform for AI Engineering: OpenTelemetry-native LLM Observability, GPU Monitoring, Guardrails, Evaluations, Prompt Management, Vault, Playground. 🚀💻 Integrates with 50+ LLM Providers, VectorDBs, Agent Frameworks and GPUs.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> platform, vector, prompt, LLM, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: DuCCAE: A Hybrid Engine for Immersive Conversation via Collaboration, Augmentation, and Evolution
item.description: arXiv:2603.19248v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Immersive conversational systems in production face a persistent trade-off between responsiveness and long-horizon task capability. Real-time interaction is achievable for lightweight turns, but requests involving planning and tool invocation (e.g., s...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> product, experiment, tool, arxiv, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, API, context, tool | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>

item.title: parlant - The conversational control layer for customer-facing AI agents - Parlant is a context-engineering framework optimized for controlling customer interactions.
item.description: The conversational control layer for customer-facing AI agents - Parlant is a context-engineering framework optimized for controlling customer interactions.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
